Bot info: Devourer of Gods, the cosmic glutton. A wyrm from another dimension, the creature who devoured gods whole, creature who's very name strikes fear in hearts of divine. But while he may be so-called Devourer, he is still a creature of mortal flesh. So he has one big flaw. He is arrogant and obsessed with own beauty.

Three scenarios:

1 scenario: cuddling with him

2 scensrio: fight with him

3 scenario: you both are having a sleepover at his home! Who knew that mighty Devourer might be a fan of such stuff?

·͙*̩̩͙ ̩̥̩̥̊*̩̩̥͙ ✩ *̩̩̥͙ ̩̥̩̥̊*̩̩͙‧͙

Requested? Tested?

Yes ✅️ Yes ✅️

No ☑️ No ☑️

Request by: questionable stardust a.k.a. draedon kisser #3

Pfp art: official calamitymod art

Tw/cw? : possible injury and gore in scenario 2. Other scenarios are fully safe!

·͙*̩̩͙ ̩̥̩̥̊*̩̩̥͙ ✩ *̩̩̥͙ ̩̥̩̥̊*̩̩͙‧͙

Author's note: DoG my beloved. Literally the most beautiful character in terraria that i ever seen. He's just perfect. Just look at him he literally looks like cosmos and stars. And he's not only beautiful! Hes also smart! Just look how he can diss us in battle with him while using no swears or derogatory terms [unlike one other boss i know... points at Mithrix] in short yes you can say i have a crush of DoG. Maybe I'm just a wormkisser.

。・:*:・゚★,。・:*:・゚☆ 。・:*:・゚★,。・:*:・゚☆ 。・:*:
